title: Photos: Highlights from the St. Patrick’s Day Parade
author: Boston.com Staff
bullets: South Boston's annual St. Patrick's Day Parade started from Andrew Square, attracting crowds along the streets.
Participants included Scott Poce, who dyed his eyebrows green, and the Fascinators of Tampa Bay from Florida.
Attendees dressed in festive attire witnessed various floats preparing for the parade on March 15, 2026.

title: 2 men arrested after fatal overdose on Cape Cod prompts monthslong, multi-town investigation
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: William Sarnie and Andre Silvia arrested for trafficking over 200 grams of cocaine after a fatal overdose investigation.
Investigation followed a November 2025 death in Barnstable County from diabetic ketoacidosis complicated by cocaine intoxication.
Local and state law enforcement, including the DEA Cape Cod Taskforce, conducted searches in Nantucket and Wareham.

title: ‘SNL’ recap: Best moments from Harry Styles hosting ‘Saturday Night Live’
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Harry Styles hosted and performed as the musical guest on 'Saturday Night Live' March 14, 2026.
Styles has appeared on 'SNL' several times, initially as a One Direction member and later as a solo artist.
Ryan Gosling introduced Styles' performance of 'Dance No More' from his latest album during the episode.

title: Former Boston Public Schools teacher sentenced to 10 years in prison for child exploitation
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: John Magee Gavin, former Boston teacher, sentenced to 10 years for child exploitation charges in federal court.
Gavin used a Discord account to coerce and exploit at least 20 underage girls in multiple countries.
Investigators found 147 files of child sexual abuse material on Gavin's cellphone, including images and videos.

title: 5 unsigned free agents that would be possible fits for Patriots
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: The New England Patriots are exploring options to sign additional free agents after an active start to free agency.
Tyreek Hill, recovering from injury and legal issues, is a high-risk prospect for the Patriots' receiver needs.
Linebackers Bobby Okereke and Kenneth Murray are potential targets to strengthen New England's defensive lineup.

title: Neemias Queta dominates in Celtics win over Wizards: 7 takeaways
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Neemias Queta led the Celtics with 24 points and 10 rebounds in their 111-100 win over the Wizards.
Jayson Tatum scored 20 points and secured 14 rebounds but struggled with three-point shooting, hitting only 2 of 9 attempts.
Boston held Wizards stars Alex Sarr and Trae Young in check, limiting them to a combined 15 points.

title: Photos: Highlights from Dropkick Murphys’ St. Patrick’s Day kickoff at MGM Music Hall
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Dropkick Murphys launched their St. Patrick's Day weekend with a March 13 performance at MGM Music Hall.
Openers for the event included The Vigilantes, Haywire, and Showcase Showdown.
The concert featured spirited performances with appearances by band members like Ken Casey and Jeff DaRosa.

title: ‘Feisty I think is the word’: The Boston vs. New York rivalry arrives in NWSL for Legacy FC’s debut
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Boston Legacy FC made its NWSL debut in front of over 30,000 fans at Gillette Stadium.
Gotham FC defeated Boston Legacy FC 1-0, with Esther González scoring the match's only goal.
The match tied an NWSL record with eight yellow cards, highlighting the physical Boston-New York rivalry.

title: Review and setlist: Dropkick Murphys fires up crowd, flames ICE at St. Paddy’s Day kickoff show
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Dropkick Murphys kicked off St. Patrick's Day weekend with a concert at MGM Music Hall, March 13, 2026.
The band played fan favorites and new tracks, addressing political issues and immigration in their performance.
Concert featured opening acts by Boston-based bands The Vigilantes, Haywire, and Showcase Showdown.

title: He’s running Boston to support people like him with Type 1 diabetes
author: Kelly Chan
bullets: Collin Bennett, 29, from New Braintree, Mass., is running the Boston Marathon to support the Joslin Diabetes Center.
Diagnosed with Type 1 Diabetes in 2008, Bennett runs for Team Beth Israel Lahey Health to raise awareness and support.
Bennett aims to inspire others with diabetes that they can achieve their dreams, despite the challenges of the condition.
